name: SGF Capital Public Company Limited
summary: SGF Capital Public Company Limited provides factoring, loans, personal loans, and leasing services in Thailand. The company operates through Purchase of Account Receivable, Leasing and Hire Purchase, and Loan segments. It provides automobile and motorcycle hire purchase loans; personal loan against vehicle registration as collateral; long and short term loan; and nano finance. The company also offers financial advice and legal counsel services, as well as purchase or transfer of loan receivables. In addition, it provides services related to building and place. The company was formerly known as Siam General Factoring Public Company Limited and changed its name to SGF Capital Public Company Limited in May 2017. SGF Capital Public Company Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
